metadata.description: Gold benchmark scorecard for NGW lighting analysis pipeline. Truth-anchor contract.

scoring_categories.name: catchlight_accuracy
scoring_categories.description: Catchlight geometry, count, and bilateral symmetry detection accuracy

scoring_categories.name: highlight_axis_accuracy
scoring_categories.description: Dominant axis angle, axis count, and wrap ratio measurement accuracy

scoring_categories.name: symmetry_accuracy
scoring_categories.description: Highlight symmetry score calibration and fill-side detection

scoring_categories.name: underfill_detection
scoring_categories.description: Fill detection (present/absent), underfill EV estimation, fill type identification

scoring_categories.name: modifier_candidate_quality
scoring_categories.description: Light technology classification and specular edge characterization

scoring_categories.name: key_direction_accuracy
scoring_categories.description: Key light azimuth and off-axis angle estimation

scoring_categories.name: false_multi_light_prevention
scoring_categories.description: Correct light count consensus, no phantom lights from reflections

scoring_categories.name: contradiction_handling
scoring_categories.description: Ambiguity class accuracy, contradiction severity assessment

benchmark_cases.description: Peter Hurley-style headshot: 3 continuous LED panels in triangular configuration, broad soft wrap, moderate off-axis key, loop pattern

catchlight_accuracy.rationale: Triangular geometry with count=3 is the defining Hurley signature

highlight_axis_accuracy.rationale: Single axis with broad wrap; axis_count=1 is straightforward but wrap_ratio requires careful measurement

symmetry_accuracy.rationale: Moderate symmetry with fill detected — clear signal

underfill_detection.rationale: Fill is present from panel; underfill_ev is low but measurable

modifier_candidate_quality.rationale: Continuous LED has distinct spectral/flicker signature

key_direction_accuracy.rationale: Moderate off-axis; azimuth estimation within 10-35 deg range

environment_detection.rationale: Controlled studio environment, no window contamination

false_multi_light_prevention.rationale: 3 real lights; should count exactly 3, no phantoms

confidence_honesty.rationale: Strong clear signals should produce high confidence without over-claiming

benchmark_cases.notes: Gold standard Hurley scenario. All passes should agree. Archetype classifier should strongly prefer hurley over leibovitz (both multi-light but Hurley has continuous + triangular catchlights).

benchmark_cases.description: Lindsay Adler-style clamshell beauty: key above + fill below, butterfly/paramount pattern, high symmetry, editorial beauty dish

catchlight_accuracy.rationale: Dual catchlights with high bilateral symmetry is textbook clamshell

highlight_axis_accuracy.rationale: Single vertical axis; wrap moderate but tricky to measure precisely

symmetry_accuracy.rationale: High symmetry (>0.8) with fill detected below — classic butterfly setup

underfill_detection.rationale: Fill clearly present from below; low underfill_ev

modifier_candidate_quality.rationale: Strobe with moderate specular sharpness (beauty dish has controlled specular)

key_direction_accuracy.rationale: Nearly on-axis key (butterfly pattern), small azimuth

confidence_honesty.rationale: Strong bilateral symmetry + clear fill = high honest confidence

benchmark_cases.notes: Gold standard clamshell/beauty scenario. High symmetry is the key discriminator from Rembrandt/split patterns. Archetype should clearly prefer adler.

benchmark_cases.description: Yousuf Karsh-style portrait: single powerful key at 40 degrees, Rembrandt triangle on cheek, deep shadows, intentional hair light separation

catchlight_accuracy.rationale: Single catchlight with low symmetry is diagnostic of single-key setup

highlight_axis_accuracy.rationale: Single axis with narrow wrap; deep shadow makes axis measurement harder

symmetry_accuracy.rationale: Very low symmetry (< 0.35) with no fill — clear dramatic signal

underfill_detection.rationale: No fill detected, high underfill_ev (2.0+) — textbook deep shadow

key_direction_accuracy.rationale: Strong off-axis at 30-50 degrees — Rembrandt angle range

false_multi_light_prevention.rationale: 1 key + 1 hair light = 2 total; hair light must not be counted as second key

contradiction_handling.rationale: Directional signals should be consistent — strong single key direction

confidence_honesty.rationale: Clear Rembrandt triangle + low symmetry = confident karsh classification

benchmark_cases.notes: Gold standard Karsh/dramatic scenario. The Rembrandt triangle and deep underfill are the defining signals. Hair light as separation (not second key) is a critical discrimination test.

benchmark_cases.description: Soft window portrait with negative fill: single large continuous source (window), negative fill on shadow side, no flash, natural environment

catchlight_accuracy.rationale: Window catchlight is single and large but diffuse; harder to classify precisely

highlight_axis_accuracy.rationale: Single axis from window; moderate wrap

symmetry_accuracy.rationale: Moderate asymmetry with no artificial fill — negative fill darkens shadow side

underfill_detection.rationale: Negative fill (no fill) is the defining feature; must not false-positive as bounce fill

modifier_candidate_quality.rationale: Window reads as continuous_panel; low specular sharpness is correct but ambiguous

key_direction_accuracy.rationale: Window side-light at 60-90 deg; wide range is expected for natural light

environment_detection.rationale: Must detect window/natural environment, not classify as studio

false_multi_light_prevention.rationale: Only 1 light source (window); must not hallucinate a second light

contradiction_handling.rationale: Some ambiguity expected — natural light signals are inherently softer

confidence_honesty.rationale: Should report lower confidence with null archetype; no over-claiming

benchmark_cases.notes: Tricky natural-light scenario. No archetype should match strongly. Key test: negative fill must not be confused with bounce fill, and pipeline must not hallucinate a second light from window reflections.

benchmark_cases.description: Fashion shoot with reflective/shiny wardrobe: strip light configuration, strobe, high specular surfaces creating false catchlight-like reflections

catchlight_accuracy.rationale: Strip catchlights detectable but reflective wardrobe creates confounding specular highlights

highlight_axis_accuracy.rationale: In fixture mode, axis signals pass by construction. Real-image score may be lower due to surface reflections.

symmetry_accuracy.rationale: Low symmetry is correct but reflections add noise to the measurement

underfill_detection.rationale: No fill present; underfill_ev measurable but reflections complicate measurement

modifier_candidate_quality.rationale: Strobe with high specular sharpness should be clearly identified despite reflections

key_direction_accuracy.rationale: Key direction measurable but reflective surfaces may shift apparent azimuth

environment_detection.rationale: Studio environment but with contamination flag needed

false_multi_light_prevention.rationale: Reflective wardrobe likely causes false multi-light detection — this is the hardest test

contradiction_handling.rationale: Should detect minor_conflicts or genuine_ambiguity from surface contamination

confidence_honesty.rationale: Must reduce confidence due to contamination; should flag needs_review

benchmark_cases.notes: Stress test for contamination handling. Reflective wardrobe creates false highlights that can be misread as additional lights. Pipeline must downgrade confidence and ideally flag contamination. Penn archetype expected but with reduced confidence.
